title: Agentic Medical RAG System
description: Scalable multi-agent RAG system with hybrid search (dense + sparse embeddings) on 1.2M PubMed articles achieving 95% precision and 87% query latency reduction. Evaluated on MEDIQA and MedQA benchmarks.

title: AutoSec AI: Cloud Security Orchestration
description: Multi-agent framework integrating RAG with MITRE ATT&CK taxonomy for automated threat analysis. Processes 2M+ security events/day with 93% precision and 95.5% accuracy in risk classification.

title: Electronics Component Detection
description: End-to-end MLOps pipeline detecting 61 types of electronic components (resistors, capacitors, sensors, Arduino boards) from images. Powered by YOLOv5s, served via Flask, containerized with Docker, automated through GitHub Actions CI/CD.

title: Kidney Tumor Identification System
description: Deep learning application for early detection of kidney tumors from CT scans using fine-tuned VGG16. Full MLOps pipeline with DVC reproducibility, MLflow + DagsHub experiment tracking, and AWS deployment via Docker and ECR.

title: Smart Attendance Portal
description: Role-based classroom attendance system with Admin and Student panels. Features analytics with date-wise pivot matrices, CSV exports with GitHub auto-commits, and real-time Supabase backend with structured logging.

title: FAANG AI Stock Analysis Dashboard
description: Web app leveraging ARIMA-LSTM hybrid forecasting to predict stock performance for Meta, Apple, Amazon, Netflix, and Google. Combines real-time stock data, financial news sentiment via VADER, and CrewAI-powered investment recommendations.

title: CloudMart: Multi-Cloud AI E-Commerce Platform
description: Scalable e-commerce platform on AWS (EKS, DynamoDB, S3, Bedrock, Lambda), integrated with GCP BigQuery for real-time analytics and Azure AI for sentiment analysis. Infrastructure managed with Terraform, CI/CD via AWS CodePipeline.

title: Community Risk Monitor
description: Real-time community safety platform monitoring fire incidents, crime statistics, weather alerts, traffic, air quality, and disaster alerts based on user location. Features a voice-activated interface ('Hey Attila'), interactive maps, and a CrewAI multi-agent architecture integrating Pirate Weather, TomTom, News, and Crime Data APIs.

title: LexiGuide: Legal Document Analyser
description: AI-powered legal document analysis tool supporting PDF and image uploads via OCR. Provides document summaries, key point extraction, legal terminology explanations, interactive Q&A using RAG, a searchable legal dictionary, and an AI chat assistant — all built with a privacy-first local processing approach.
